nasb.text: so that the priests could not stand to minister because of the cloud, for the glory of the Lord filled the house of God.

esv.text: so that the priests could not stand to minister because of the cloud, for the glory of the Lord filled the house of God.

cnv.text: 由於那雲彩的緣故，祭司都不能侍立供職，因為　神的殿充滿了耶和華的榮光。

ccb.text: 以致祭司不能在殿里供职，因为殿里充满了耶和华上帝的荣光。
